text:
TheParisOlympics are underway after aspectacular and historic opening ceremony got the Games off the groundin the French capital last night.

The stage is set for what promises to be a compelling fortnight of pulsating action and drama, withhigh hopes for Team GBacross 26 of the 32 sports on show across the Channel.

Some of the competition already kicked off in the week – including football, rugby sevens and shooting – but today marks the official day one of the Games and there is so much to look forward to over the coming hours.

Follow Metro.co.uk’s live blog for latest updates on the Paris Olympics

From a British perspective, Michael Bargeron and Seonaid McIntosh will aim to get their hands on Team GB’s first medals of thesummerwhen the mixed air rifle finals get underway this morning.

The shooting finals are then followed by the women’s 3m synchronised diving final in which Team GB pair Yasmin Harper and Scarlett Mew Jensen are targeting medals.

A whole host of Team GB hopefuls will be in action the pool at the Paris La Defense Arena later today, with Adam Peaty and Katie Ledecky competing in the men’s 100m breaststroke and women’s 400m freestyle respectively.

In the road cycling this afternoon, meanwhile, Josh Tarling and Anna Henderson are both being tipped for success.

Read the full schedule for the day below:

Badminton

Basketball

Beach volleyball

Boxing

Canoe slalom

Cycling (road)

Diving

Equestrian

Fencing

Football

Handball

Hockey

Judo

Rowing

Rugby sevens

Shooting

Skateboarding(RESCHEDULED FOR MONDAY DUE TO BAD WEATHER)

Surfing

Swimming

Table tennis

Tennis

Volleyball

Water polo

For more stories like this,check our sport page.

title: Olympics 2024 timetable: Full day one schedule in Paris | Metro News
description: The full day one schedule at the 2024 Paris Olympics, including Team GB's medal hopefuls in the French capital.
